scenarios.description: child(0) on element with only non-Element child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: Element contains a single TextNode child only
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child on non-element-only children

scenarios.description: child(n) after cache primed then new Element added triggers cache invalidation and returns correct new child
scenarios.precondition: Element has two children and cache primed by initial child() call
scenarios.expectedResult: child(2) returns newly added third Element after cache invalidation
pseudocode: TEST TC10 cache invalidation on new child
